About

Turning data into decisions
faster than humans can act

I'm an Applied AI Engineer with 3+ years building and deploying GenAI and agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent workflows across healthcare and financial services. I drive solutions end-to-end — partnering across product, engineering, and operations to turn ambiguous problems into agentic tools teams actually use.

At UnitedHealth Group, I architected a GenAI recommendation system using LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, and a vector database, and built agentic automation workflows in Zapier orchestrating 5+ APIs that cut manual processing time by 60%. At Cigna Healthcare, I built enterprise AI chatbots serving 5,000+ users and migrated legacy infrastructure to AWS and Snowflake, improving query performance by 35%.

I'm pursuing my MS in Information Systems at NJIT (GPA 3.72, graduating Dec 2026), and continue to work across LangChain, LangGraph, Claude Code, and MCP integrations to build agentic tools end to end.

APM — Hyperlocal Grocery Delivery Platform

02 — LLM-Powered App
RAG PipelineHealthcare
Clinical Report Summarizer
RAG pipeline turning unstructured clinical reports into clinician-ready summaries

Designed and built a RAG pipeline that chunks and embeds unstructured clinical reports into a vector store, retrieves relevant context per query, and generates clinician-ready summaries via LangChain agents with custom prompts tuned for medical terminology. Used Claude Code and MCP integrations to accelerate development, debugging, prompt iteration, and testing.

03 — Data Engineering
Data WarehouseCloud
Multi-Source Unified Data Warehouse
Unified pipeline from REST APIs and flat files to a single Snowflake source of truth

Built a unified cloud data warehouse consolidating data from REST APIs, relational databases, and flat files into Snowflake. dbt models enforce schema transformation and data quality checks, while Airflow orchestrates scheduled ingestion — replacing manual, spreadsheet-driven reporting with a single automated source of truth.

04 — AI Agent
AI AutomationReal Estate
Property Maintenance AI — WhatsApp Ticketing Bot
60% faster response · automated ticket routing

AI-powered property maintenance automation platform eliminating unstructured email-based request workflows. Tenants submit maintenance requests via WhatsApp with photos — the system uses Gemini API to analyze the image, auto-generates a structured ticket with priority classification, routes it to the appropriate team, and delivers real-time status updates.
